entities.name: WEATHER RISKS
entities.description: Increasing risks associated with weather patterns that threaten agricultural production and food security

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems used for the production of agricultural goods

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in agricultural output and productivity

entities.name: CLIMATE SHOCKS
entities.description: Sudden, extreme weather events that disrupt agricultural systems

entities.name: RESILIENT FOOD PRODUCTION SYSTEM
entities.description: A food production system capable of absorbing and recovering from climate shocks

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL GOALS
entities.description: Socio-economic targets for improvement in vulnerable countries

entities.name: TECHNOLOGICAL INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Technical solutions and tools proposed to help farmers adapt to weather variability

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Organizational and structural solutions proposed to help farmers adapt to weather variability

entities.name: POLICY INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Governmental and regulatory solutions proposed to help farmers adapt to weather variability

entities.name: WEATHER VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in weather patterns over time

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS (GHG) EMISSIONS
entities.description: Emissions of gases that contribute to the greenhouse effect and climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART VILLAGE (CSV) APPROACH
entities.description: An integrative strategy for agricultural research for development that tests technological and institutional options using participatory methods

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Research focused on creating practical solutions for agricultural improvement in developing regions

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY METHODS
entities.description: Research approaches that involve the active participation of local stakeholders

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies designed to increase productivity, enhance resilience, and reduce GHG emissions

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management practices that are resilient to climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART SERVICES
entities.description: Support services that facilitate the adoption of climate-smart agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART PROCESSES
entities.description: Operational processes that support climate-smart agricultural goals

entities.name: LOCAL CLIMATIC RISK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of identifying and mitigating climate-related risks at a local level

entities.name: ADAPTATION GAINS
entities.description: The positive outcomes and benefits derived from successful climate adaptation

entities.name: MALADAPTATION
entities.description: Adaptation actions that inadvertently increase vulnerability to climate change

entities.name: TRADE-OFFS
entities.description: The balance between conflicting objectives or costs associated with adaptation options

entities.name: LOCAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Indigenous or community-based knowledge regarding local environment and farming

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT PLANS
entities.description: Strategic frameworks for regional or national socio-economic development

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Continent where the CSV approach was implemented and tested

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Continent where the CSV approach was implemented and tested

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: Region where the CSV approach was implemented and tested

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL SETTINGS
entities.description: The combination of environmental and biological factors affecting agriculture in a specific area

entities.name: CLIMATE ANALOG STUDIES
entities.description: Studies that identify current locations with climates similar to predicted future climates

entities.name: ADAPTATION PLANNING
entities.description: The process of designing strategies to adapt to future climate scenarios
